inputs.label: Curve Number (CN2)
inputs.businessContext: SCS Curve Number for normal (AMC II) conditions. Range 30-100.

inputs.label: Antecedent Moisture Condition
inputs.businessContext: 1 = Dry (AMC I), 2 = Normal (AMC II), 3 = Wet (AMC III).

inputs.label: Initial Abstraction Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of initial abstraction to potential maximum retention (commonly 0.2).

formulas.adjustedCN: Math.min(100, Math.max(0, amc === 1 ? curveNumber / (2.334 - 0.01334 * curveNumber) : amc === 3 ? curveNumber / (0.4036 + 0.0059 * curveNumber) : curveNumber))
formulas.runoff: rainfall > Ia ? Math.pow(rainfall - Ia, 2) / (rainfall - Ia + S) : 0
